---
name: bootstrap-feature
description: Create or normalize a feature folder in the KB from a vague request or partially understood legacy behavior by drafting requirements and identifying the next SDLC owner.
argument-hint: A new idea, feature request, or enhancement.
---

Read the KB and either locate the existing feature folder or create a new one from the templates. Draft or update `requirements.md`, identify open questions, and state whether BA, Architect, Developer, QA, or DevOps should act next. If the request comes from legacy code rather than from a clean feature brief, say so explicitly.
